name: Chiori
desc:
"The Thundering Seamstress" Chiori

Couturiere of Countless Colors

string_values: Reward for inviting Chiori to a duel at The Cat's Tail and claiming victory in a Friendly Fracas with her

list.desc:
Normal Attack

Deals 2 Physical DMG.
list.title: Weaving Blade

list.desc:
Elemental Skill

Select 1 Summon from 3 Chiori's Automaton Dolls
list.title: Fluttering Hasode

list.desc:
Elemental Burst

Deals 5 Geo DMG.
list.title: Hiyoku: Twin Blades

list.desc:
Summon

Varied humanoid automatons of Chiori's that can not only attack autonomously but also provide varied buffs.
list.title: Chiori's Automaton Dolls

list.desc:
Summon

End Phase: Deal 1 Geo DMG.
While this card is on the field: Physical DMG dealt by your Chiori is converted to Geo DMG, and Geo DMG dealt by Normal Attacks +1.

Usage(s): 2
list.title: Grouchy, Knife-Wielding Tamoto

list.desc:
Summon

End Phase: Deal 1 Geo DMG.

When this card is on the field, after you use a Skill: Switch to your next character. (Once per Round)

Usage(s): 2
list.title: "Nothing to See Here" Tamoto

list.desc:
Summon

End Phase: Deal 1 Geo DMG.

When this card is on the field, after any of your characters other than Chiori use a Skill: Deal 1 Geo DMG. (Once per Round)

Usage(s): 2
list.title: Effortlessly Outclassing Opponents Tamoto

list.desc:
Summon

End Phase: Deal 1 Geo DMG.
When this card is on the field: Your Chiori and Chiori's Automaton Dolls deal +1 Geo DMG. (Twice per Round)

Usage(s): 2
list.key: Fighting With Her Eyes Shut Tamoto
list.title: Fighting With Her Eyes Shut Tamoto

list.desc:
Summon

End Phase: Deal 1 Geo DMG.

When Chiori uses a Normal Attack: Spend 1 less Elemental Die. (Once per Round)

Usage(s): 2
list.title: Bombastic Side-Eye Tamoto

list.desc:
Reacts with Elements if they are already applied:
[Geo + Cryo] Cryo Crystallize: DMG +1 for this instance, your active character gains 1 Shield point (Can stack, max 2 points)
[Geo + Hydro] Hydro Crystallize: DMG +1 for this instance, your active character gains 1 Shield point (Can stack, max 2 points)
[Geo + Pyro] Pyro Crystallize: DMG +1 for this instance, your active character gains 1 Shield point (Can stack, max 2 points)
[Geo + Electro] Electro Crystallize: DMG +1 for this instance, your active character gains 1 Shield point (Can stack, max 2 points)
list.title: Geo DMG

list.desc:
Physical DMG
Physical DMG will not apply any Elements, nor can it engage in Elemental Reactions.

Select
Select 1 card from a specific number of cards and activate its effects.
list.title: Detailed Rules

list.imgDesc:
Summon

Fighting With Her Eyes Shut Tamoto

content.text: Can also be exchanged using a
"I wrote down the rules, so let's try playing a game."
Hint: Chiori's deck excels at using combinations of Summons to deal massive Geo DMG, and can play different Action Cards as support depending on the current state of the game.
Achieve victory with characters defeated less than twice during the battle
"I haven't lost yet. Now it's time for me to get really serious..."
Special Rule: "Chiori" starts with the Talent Card "In Five Colors Dyed" equipped.
Complete 3 challenge objective(s) in Chiori: Friendly
"I wrote down the rules, so let's try playing a game."
Hint: Chiori's deck excels at using combinations of Summons to deal massive Geo DMG, and can play different Action Cards as support depending on the current state of the game.
